core_skills: Golang, AWS services, Docker, Linux operating systems, Shell scripting
skill_match_scores: Golang:1.0, AWS services:1.0, Docker:1.0, Linux operating systems:0.0, Shell scripting:1.0
must_have_quals: 2–4 years of experience in backend development, Strong proficiency in Golang, Experienced in Docker and containerized deployments, Hands-on experience with AWS services, Solid understanding of Linux operating systems and shell scripting, Experience with Redis for caching and data management, Good understanding of API design, microservices, and distributed systems, Experience with SQL/NoSQL databases, Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and version control (Git), Bachelor's degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience)
preferred_quals: Experience with React or some front-end technologies, Experience with Kubernetes or other orchestration tools, Familiarity with serverless architecture, Knowledge of monitoring and logging tools (CloudWatch, Prometheus, etc.)
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Golang, Build and optimize RESTful APIs and microservices architecture, Implement and manage cloud infrastructure using AWS services, Ensure application performance, scalability, and security, Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and deliver new features, Write clean, maintainable, and testable code following best practices, Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement, Integrate and optimize Redis for caching and data storage
job_summary: FlexTrade Systems is a global leader in high performance multi-asset execution management and order management systems. They are seeking a skilled Backend Developer with expertise in Golang and AWS services to design, develop, and maintain scalable backend systems while ensuring high performance and reliability.
